title: LitigationBench tests models with and without production safeguards
friendlyTitle: A new test checks AI models on real litigation work
summary: Litco has published a litigation-focused benchmark that runs models on the same tasks both alone and inside its guarded production agent. The leaderboard exposes quality, metered cost, fabricated authorities and false-premise failures, including failures by models used in Litco’s own product.
friendlySummary: LitigationBench compares models on legal tasks with and without extra safety checks. It shows quality, cost and mistakes such as invented legal sources.
whyItMatters: Domain buyers need evaluations that test the surrounding workflow, not only a raw model score. Public failure details can help legal teams compare trade-offs, although a vendor-run benchmark should be treated as one piece of independent due diligence rather than a final verdict.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Legal teams can compare models more carefully, but they should also use independent tests before trusting a vendor’s results.
